calendar.matters:
PETITION RE SUBSTITUTED JUDGMENT TRUST
Off Calendar Oct-17-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kevin Lachona for Thomas Lucas.

Mr. Lachona stated that the Beneficiary applied through separate Counsel for Medi Cal and SSI (Supplemental Security Income), that he was denied on both accounts, that he appealed one and that he received a final determination that he was not eligible. Mr. Lachona also spoke of the Beneficiaries disability and stated that he did not think the Trustee or his office has any concern about the Beneficiary's ability to manage the funds. The Court granted the Petition for Order Terminating Special Needs Trust and Distributing Remaining Trust Assets (subject to review of the order). The Court encouraged Counsel to have a conversation with Mr. Cheng on managing funds.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)
